title: Elizabeth Anscombe's 'Modern Moral Philosophy' Revisited
text:
the title of my talk is revisiting
modern moral
philosophy in 1958 the journal
philosophy published an essay by
Elizabeth ancam who was then a fellow of
Somerville College Oxford titled modern
moral philosophy according to the
journal's website it is the most cited
article in its history modern moral
philosophy has the distinction of being
one of the most widely read essays of
20th century anglo-american analytic
philosophy although its influence and
Legacy is secure so I have no doubt that
it will continue to be assigned and
discussed and cited throughout this
Century I would like to suggest that its
main points are still largely
misunderstood and that we have not fully
taken the measure of its Central
Point modern moral philosophy begins
with and centers around three
controversial Theses these are on your

in her

failed to see how the three thesis of

all too brief course of treatment so
